title: Distant Vanilla
description: A curated collection of lightweight mods and shaders that dramatically enhance vanilla Minecraft’s visuals, delivering a richer, more immersive experience while preserving the classic feel. Enjoy improved aesthetics, smoother performance, and elevated game
body:
This mod pack significantly enhances your overall Minecraft experience by introducing stunning visuals that truly bring the game to life. One of the standout features is the inclusion of distant horizons, which adds a improve reach of the landscape, making exploration even more immersive. Additionally, the mod pack offers numerous improvements, such as better train generation that enriches your world with more realistic stunning views. You will also notice enhanced sound effects that elevate the audio experience, making everything from the ambient sounds to specific actions more engaging and lifelike. Furthermore, optimized elytra movement allows for smoother and more responsive flying, giving you greater control as you soar through the skies. 

I hope you take the time to enjoy the mod pack I’ve created! It’s designed to transform your playtime into an exciting and visually captivating adventure.

resourcepack [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true]
